description: Recto: draft Karaite deed of release (ספר נקיון). Dated: Thursday, 13 Kislev 1342 Seleucid = 11 November 1030 CE. Yaʿīsh b. Mevorakh the attorney (פקיד) of Binyamin b. Yaʿaqov al-Baṣrī releases Isḥāq b. Ṭayyib al-Ṣayrafī from all obligations except 21 + 1/2 + 1 qiat, to be repaid in installments of 1 dinar per month. Legal phrases. 53 lines. Incomplete. This document continues for 15 more lines on the verso. (Information from CUDL and Goitein's note card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
